PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Asis, in person, for Robert C. Whealton, Petitioner.

The court advises of its tentative ruling to appoint the Petitioner as Executor of the estate and to take the Accounting Petition off calendar. Counsel agrees with the court's tentative ruling on the Petition for Probate of Will but asks that the court continue the Accounting Petition to allow for the filing of an amended Petition and offers advocacy for her request. After additional discussion, the court advises that it will be granting the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. Robert C. Whealton will be appointed Successor Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond will be set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons will remain probate referee. A Status on close of estate will be reset for Jun-26-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on the filing of a Final Account of the deceased Executor's administration of this estate will be set for Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Accounting Petition set for hearing this morning is continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Denied

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 20, 2001 is admitted to probate. Karen W. Marable is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 22, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Asis, in court, for Karen Marable, Petitioner.

The court at the outset advises counsel that there is an issue with mailing and publication of notice and accordingly, the court will require new mailing and publication of notice.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 2, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
